title: Hymenidium decurrens
taxonomy: Hymenidium decurrens is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Hymenidium. The classification of Hymenidium decurrens is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms. As a member of the Rubiaceae family, it is closely related to other flowering plants in this family. The specific classification of Hymenidium decurrens is still a subject of ongoing research and may be refined as more information becomes available.
